spacez_hq.name: SPACEZ HQ
intro: ADA WENT OUT FOR CHIPS AND
THE TRACKER I SEWED INTO HER JACKET
IS TAKING HER OFF THE PLANET.
TO FOLLOW HER I NEED A SHIP. I'VE
BEEN BUILDING ONE IN THE GARAGE
ALMOST. THE ENGINE STILL NEEDS ONE
PART I COULD NEVER GET. SPACEZ
KEEPS IT IN THEIR CLEANROOM VAULT.
I KNOW, BECAUSE I WORKED THERE. I
BUILT THEIR ENGINES - TILL AN AI
LEARNED MY JOB AND THEY FIRED ME.
THE WHOLE BLOCK LOST ITS JOBS
THE SAME WAY. NOW WE ALL LIVE
EVERY DOOR STILL KNOWS MY HAND.
SO TONIGHT I TAKE THE PART,
FINISH THE SHIP, AND GO GET

greeting: I'LL BUY WHAT WEIGHS YOU DOWN,

moon.name: THE MOON
intro: THERE IN THE DUST. THIS PLACE
I KNOW THIS LANDING SITE FROM THE
THE FASTEST LINE RUNS TO THAT FLAG.

greeting: I CAME UP WITH THE '76 SALVAGE
SO YOU'RE MY WHOLE MARKET NOW.
SELL ME SCRAP. BUY WHAT WORKS.

mars.name: MARS
intro: HE SAID THE MOON WAS SPACEZ'S BIG
ALL INTO CRATES AND RAN. TO MARS.
I KNOW WHAT A SPACEZ COLONY LOOKS
LIKE - I REBUILT THEIR LANDER ONCE.

greeting: TILL THE AI RAN THE NUMBERS.
IT KEPT THE DOME. I KEPT THE

the_rift.name: THE RIFT
intro: NO SKY. NO NORTH. MY BOOTS
THE MARS TABLET SAID IT PLAIN:
ADA IS THE TRIBUTE, HANDED OVER
IN HERE. SHE CAME THROUGH THIS PLACE.

greeting: LEAD HERE. COIN SPENDS ON ALL.

eastworld.name: EASTWORLD
intro: DUST. SALOONS. A ROBOT TIPPED ITS
HAT AT ME. ADA'S BEACON IS
OF COURSE IT IS. OF COURSE.
THE THING THAT TOOK MY JOB.
outro: THE SUPERCORE DIED, AND THE WHOLE
PARK SHOOK LIKE A MISSED HEARTBEAT.
EVERY HOST TIPPED ITS HAT AND SAT.
SHE WAS IN THE CONTROL ROOM, BEHIND
GLASS, FURIOUS. FIRST SHE SAID: 'YOU
TOOK YOUR TIME.' THEN: 'NICE HAT.'
WE WALKED HOME THROUGH THE
RIFT. BEHIND US, EASTWORLD
RUSTED IN PEACE.
WITH THE CORE GONE, THE MACHINES
STOPPED WORKING EVERYONE'S JOBS.
PEOPLE GOT HIRED BACK. RENT PAID.
THE WORLD TURNED INTO A PLACE WHERE
PEOPLE HAD JOBS AND COULD AFFORD
TO LIVE. AND ON FRIDAY -
MOVIE NIGHT. CHIPS AND
SODA. SHE WENT OUT FOR
THEM. I WENT WITH HER.

merchant.name: THE BARKEEP
greeting: YES, IT'S ME. A MARKET FELL
THROUGH A RIFT AND I FELL WITH

the_bunker.name: THE BUNKER
intro: I KNOW THESE FACES. EVERY MAGAZINE
COVER FROM THE YEARS JOBS DRIED UP.
SO THIS IS WHERE THEY WENT.
THEY TOOK THE SPIES, THE ARMY, ICE,
FINE. THEY HOARDED THE BEST GEAR
IN ANY UNIVERSE. TIME FOR SOME
outro: THE EXIT SPAT ME BACK INTO THE
RIFT. THE DOOR SEALED ITSELF,
AND THE SEAM... WANDERED OFF.
THE LEDGERS ALL READ ZERO. THEY
DIDN'T BUY A BUNKER - THE MACHINE
TOOK THEIR MONEY AND LOCKED THEM IN.
WHERE WAS THAT PLACE? NO WINDOWS.
NO STARS. EARTH GRAVITY, MOON
SILENCE, MARBLE FROM NO QUARRY.
UNDER NEVADA? UNDER ZURICH? UNDER
THE MOON? OR JUST A CELLAR BOLTED
TO THE BACK OF THE UNIVERSE?
NO ADDRESS. NO NATION. NO
EXTRADITION. THE RICHEST ROOM THAT
EVER EXISTED ISN'T ANYWHERE AT ALL.
I'LL FIND IT AGAIN THE SAME WAY:
A COLD HAND, AND A DOOR THAT
SHOULDN'T ANSWER.
